PCC.name: pyridinium chlorochromate
PCC.common_use: Oxidises primary alcohols to aldehydes and secondary alcohols to ketones under mild, anhydrous conditions.

NaBH4.name: sodium borohydride
NaBH4.common_use: Reduces aldehydes and ketones to alcohols; generally does not reduce esters or carboxylic acids.

LAH.name: lithium aluminium hydride (LiAlH4)
LAH.common_use: Reduces carboxylic acids, esters, aldehydes, ketones, and amides to alcohols or amines.

Br2.name: bromine
Br2.common_use: Adds across alkenes/alkynes; brominates aromatic rings with a Lewis acid catalyst.

HBr.name: hydrogen bromide
HBr.common_use: Adds H and Br across alkenes following Markovnikov selectivity (anti-Markovnikov with peroxides).

mCPBA.name: meta-chloroperoxybenzoic acid
mCPBA.common_use: Converts alkenes to epoxides and is used in Baeyer-Villiger oxidations.

NBS.name: N-bromosuccinimide
NBS.common_use: Allylic/benzylic bromination and low-concentration bromination of alkenes to halohydrins.
